content.speakerText: I'll leave you to get settled — I'll be back in 10 minutes with the team.
content.speakerTextCn: 我先不打扰您了，10分钟后带团队回来。
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much — I really appreciate your help!
Got it, I’ll be ready when you get back.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解和感谢，而非忽视或质疑
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合职场日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 appreciate / thanks / no worries 等礼貌表达

content.speakerText: If you need anything before we start — water, extra pens, etc. — just let me know.
content.speakerTextCn: 会议开始前若需要什么，比如水或笔，随时告诉我。
expectedAnswers: I'm all set, but thanks for asking!
Actually, could I get a glass of water? Thanks!
Okay, will do — I’ll let you know if anything comes up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了支持提议，或自然提出需求
语言准确性：语法和用词正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、礼貌、不生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 thanks for asking / let you know / actually 等自然表达
